name: Coupon: Redeem

description.en: Apply a discount coupon code at checkout. Your redemption is securely recorded.
description.de: Rabattgutscheincode beim Bezahlen einlösen. Deine Einlösung wird sicher gespeichert.
description.fr: Appliquez un code promo au moment du paiement. L utilisation est enregistree de facon securisee.
description.es: Aplica un codigo de descuento al pagar. El canje queda registrado de forma segura.
description.ro: Aplica un cod de reducere la plata. Folosirea lui este inregistrata in siguranta.

bot: Redeems an on-chain coupon by code. Ask the user for the coupon code they want to apply.

inputs.name: Coupon Code

description.en: Enter the coupon code to redeem.
description.fr: Saisissez le code promo a utiliser.
description.es: Introduce el codigo del cupon que quieres canjear.
description.ro: Introdu codul cuponului pe care vrei sa il folosesti.

inputs.bot: The coupon code to redeem — e.g. SUMMER20, VIP50.

success.en: Coupon redeemed! Your discount has been applied.
success.de: Gutschein eingelöst! Dein Rabatt wurde angewendet.
success.fr: Coupon utilise ! Votre reduction a bien ete appliquee.
success.es: Cupon canjeado. Tu descuento ya se ha aplicado.
success.ro: Cupon folosit! Reducerea ta a fost aplicata.
